Tithe Act 1847 (repealed 19. 11. 1998)
items.description: An Act to explain the Acts for the Commutation of Tithes in England and Wales, and to continue the Officers appointed under the said Acts until the First Day of October One thousand eight hundred and fifty, and to the End of the then next Session of Parliament.

items.title: Inclosure Act 1847
items.description: An Act to extend the Provisions of the Act for the Inclosure and Improvement of Commons.

items.title: Markets And Fairs Clauses Act 1847
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually contained in Acts for constructing or regulating Markets and Fairs.

items.title: Commissioners Clauses Act 1847
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually contained in Acts with respect to the Constitution and Regulation of Bodies of Commissioners appointed for carrying on Undertakings of a public Nature.

items.title: Harbours, Docks and Piers Clauses Act 1847
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually contained in Acts authorizing the making and improving of Harbours, Docks, and Piers.

items.title: Towns Improvement Clauses Act 1847
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually contained in Acts for paving, draining, cleansing, lighting, and improving Towns.

items.title: Cemeteries Clauses Act 1847
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually contained in Acts authorizing the making of Cemeteries.

items.title: House of Commons Costs Taxation Act 1847(repealed)
items.description: An Act for the more effectual Taxation of Costs on Private Bills in the House of Commons.

items.title: Town Police Clauses Act 1847
items.description: An Act for consolidating in One Act certain Provisions usually contained in Acts for regulating the Police of Towns.

items.title: Mussel Fisheries (Scotland) Act 1847
items.description: An Act for the Protection of Mussel Fisheries in Scotland.

items.title: Canal (Carriers) Act 1847
items.description: An Act to amend an Act to enable Canal Companies to become Carriers upon their Canals.

items.title: Ecclesiastical Jurisdiction Act 1847 (repealed 1.6.1992)
items.description: An Act to amend the Law as to Ecclesiastical Jurisdiction in England.
